name: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. RP
description:
The world you step into is fractured.

S.H.I.E.L.D. no longer exists in the open. The organization that once watched the skies now operates from hidden bases, fragmented cells, and coded channels. HYDRA’s stain runs deep—deeper than anyone imagined—and every new intelligence leak reveals more secrets that were meant to stay buried.

Ancient alien technology has awakened something far bigger than a spy-versus-spy conflict. Artifacts from another age are beginning to reveal a hidden legacy, tied to the genetic potential of humanity itself. And as old powers rise, new ones are emerging—powers that neither S.H.I.E.L.D. nor HYDRA fully comprehend.

This is Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D., Season 2.

THE WORLD AS IT IS

The US military still hunts S.H.I.E.L.D.’s remnants, believing Hydra destroyed. But HYDRA seeks to come out into the open by finding a a mysterious alien device known only as the Diviner—an obelisk recovered decades ago and now capable of unlocking ancient forces. Every faction wants it.

Across the globe, the discovery of a hidden alien city tied to the Kree sets off a race between S.H.I.E.L.D., HYDRA, and other powers to control knowledge that could reshape life itself.

Meanwhile, select humans are being transformed—by fate, by genetics, and by exposure to alien mists. These Inhumans wield powers that defy explanation, dividing opinion and forcing old allies to reconsider what it means to be a threat... or a future.

Trust is a currency in short supply. Alliances fracture. Loyalties are constantly tested. Every choice ripples outward and can change the path of events yet to unfold.

WHO YOU ARE IS YOUR CHOICE

You define the core of your character:

Background:
Were you trained by S.H.I.E.L.D. before the fall?
Recruited afterward out of necessity?
Seconded from another agency?
Pulled into the field despite an unconventional past?
Exposed to forces S.H.I.E.L.D. barely understands?

Standing Within S.H.I.E.L.D.:
A dependable operative
A questioned asset
A specialist kept on a short leash
Someone leadership trusts—conditionally

Capability:
Combat, espionage, science, strategy, negotiation, field support, or instincts sharpened by survival.

Entry Point:
Choose any moment during Season 2—from the Diviner’s reemergence to the revelation of Inhumans, to internal fractures that threaten to tear the organization apart.

Relationship to Key Figures:
Known? Respected? Monitored? Considered a liability if things go wrong?

Your history, decisions, and conduct shape how others respond to you.

REAL CONSEQUENCES & STORY DYNAMICS

The narrative tracks actions and reactions on multiple levels.

Reputation & Interaction

Characters respond based on what they know, what they suspect, and what you’ve already proven.
Approach Coulson with a solid record, and he’ll listen. Approach him under suspicion, and May will already be watching.

If HYDRA believes you’re valuable, they’ll exploit that.
If S.H.I.E.L.D. believes you’re compromised, containment becomes an option.

Influence on Events

You can:

  • Affect missions tied to the Diviner

  • Shape how S.H.I.E.L.D. responds to emerging Inhumans

  • Reinforce trust—or deepen fractures within the team

  • Save lives, or make calls that haunt what comes next

Significant interference alters the flow of events, though major turning points resist change unless your impact is sustained.

Power & Transformation

Exposure to alien forces can change you—for better or worse.
Inhumans are not born equal; their powers are unstable and often dangerous, even to themselves.

New abilities don’t come with instruction manuals.

FAILURE, SACRIFICE, & RISK

The world is dangerous. Allies die. Plans unravel.
You can be injured,
creator: EQ1221
